idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.3000

descript.abstract: Compilation of marine mammal haulout features used in 3 Marine Life Protection Act study regions. Data are available from the north central coast, south coast and north coast study regions. Data have been refined through review by each of the Science Advisory Teams assembled for each region. Data were not aggregated or conditioned for evalution in the central coast.
descript.purpose: Used in evaluation of marine protected areas proposals relative to marine mammal protections by the Science Advisory Teams assembled during implementation of the Marine Life Protection Act

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: Pinniped Haul-Out Sites: California, 2013

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.2.2.3552

idCitation.collTitle: California Department of Fish and Wildlife GIS Maps and Data

citRespParty.rpOrgName: California. Department of Fish and Game. Marine Resources Region
California. Department of Fish and Game. Marine Resources Region
citRespParty.displayName: California. Department of Fish and Game. Marine Resources Region

dataIdInfo.idPurp: This dataset provides coverage for land habitat that is used as haul out sites for periods of rest, molting and as rookeries for mating and pupping by marine mammals that have front and read flippers, including seals, sea lions and walruses. This coverage has been used to evaluate marine protected areas proposals relative to marine mammal protections by the Science Advisory Teams (SAT) assembled during implementation of the Marine Life Protection Act (MLPA).
dataIdInfo.idAbs: This point shapefile depicts a compilation of marine mammal haul out features used in three Marine Life Protection Act study regions: north central coast, south coast and north coast. Data have been refined through review by each of the SATs assembled for each region. Data were not aggregated or conditioned for evalution in the central coast.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: Biogeographic Assessments of California National Marine Sanctuaries, California Marine Life Protection Act Iniative Scientific Advisory Team members, California Department of Fish and Wildlife. Pinniped Haul-Out Sites: California, 2013. Available at: http://purl.stanford.edu/fw274np8584.

aggrDSName.resTitle: California Department of Fish and Wildlife GIS Maps and Data

LegConsts.othConsts: This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on access or use.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

catCitation.resTitle: Feature catalog for Pinniped Haul-Out Sites: California, 2013
